name: Stamina
description: Stamina is a resource with a maximum of 50. Stamina can be drained by sprinting (-5 per 60 ticks) or by using certain powers. Stamina can be regained over time by standing still (+2 per 80 ticks), using certain abilities, or by consuming Stamina Surges (+20 per Surge). High stamina will grant you faster movement speed. Low stamina will hinder your movement speed and inhibit your flight.
